log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Halfling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Halfling — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Halfling — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Halfling — Unarmored Caster HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Halfling — Unarmored Caster HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Halfling — Unarmored Caster HP: 16/67
--- Halfling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 16/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (16/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Halfling — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Halfling — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Halfling — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Halfling — Unarmored Caster HP: -4/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
